MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on August 21, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to respond to the Probate Examiner's notes. The status hearing is also continued to that date.
